color_palette.emotional_logic: The primary slate blue-grey (#5c5e6c) creates a cold, oppressive mood that anchors inherited dread, dominating moments of Cronus's rule and the lingering sense of inevitable betrayal. The secondary muted parchment (#b8aa92) references ancient stone and bone, surfacing in moments of revelation or when the fractured heirloom motif is shown, tying to the tactile and archaeological. The accent color, a deep muted rust (#b54c2b), appears only at the climactic moment of generational rupture—the shattering of the family bond or final act of rebellion—its rare warmth signifying bloodline, pain, and irrevocable change. The background near-black indigo (#26262e) is consistent throughout, supporting the claustrophobic, shadow-heavy world and allowing both dread and uneasy triumph to register without the release or purity of true black or white.

lighting_style: Dominant lighting is diffuse, cold, and shadow-heavy, as if filtered through thick stone or overcast sky (4300K–5200K). Primary sources are motivated by practicals—candlelight and torch glow, but always filtered so shadows fall deep and ambiguous. No high-key or heroic setups; light shapes space minimally and never fully reveals, keeping the world half-hidden. During moments of paranoia, practicals only—no fill; shadows deepen. In 'triumph' sequences, light is static, wide, and distant, highlighting emotional separation.
texture_and_grain: Muted tactile mixed-media: marble bas-relief photo-overlay with tactile stone grain, combined with subtle digital film grain and shallow engraving lines. Surfaces appear tactile—cool, faintly rough, as if running a hand over ancient carved stone with dust trapped in the cracks.
typography_style: Sparse, all-caps serif with stone-engraved texture for rare title cards or overlays after the opening. Weight is medium; spacing is wide for a timeless, institutional feel. The type is slightly eroded or distressed, echoing the fractured motif and trauma. No text overlays in the opening per forbidden elements; only after context emerges.
midjourney_style_suffix: marble bas-relief mixed-media, cold diffuse overcast lighting, desaturated slate blue-grey palette, tactile stone grain and digital film grain overlay --ar 9:16 --style raw --v 6.1
